description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a prominent cantilevered upper floor clad in vertical wooden panels. The lower level is finished with a textured stone facade and large glass folding doors, providing a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows wrap around the upper story, allowing abundant natural light into the interior spaces. The structure includes a flat roof, some sections of which appear to be accessible or designed as terraces with green elements. The color palette is dominated by natural tones, including white, gray, brown, and stone textures. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with clean lines and a strong emphasis on geometric forms.
description: A modern, two-story house with a cantilevered upper floor, stone and wood exterior finishes, and large floor-to-ceiling windows. The design is minimalist, featuring flat roofs and expansive glass surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stone-clad lower level with large folding glass doors and the cantilevered upper floor with wood paneling and wide windows.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the full expanse of the wood-paneled upper floor and its large, continuous window, with the stone base visible below.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white upper section with large windows and the stone lower level, as well as the transition between materials.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the white upper story with multiple windows and a green roof section, with the stone base and glass doors below.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features large folding glass doors at ground level, no porch or steps, with a minimalist and open design.
